name: Iron Bear Resources Ltd
analysis: It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0720, stop A$0.0564, target A$0.1187 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
